stemHtml: An aircraft is flying at FL50 and requests a descent to an altitude of 3000 ft. The aircraft’s call sign is F-PO and the transition level is published in the national AIP. To grant this descent, what would be the correct response from ATC?

options.a: ‘’F-PO, CLEARED FROM FL50 3000 FT QFE 1005’’
options.b: ‘’F-PO, IS CLEARED TO DESCEND TO 3000 FT QFE 1005’’
